twitter_thread: 87% of consumer productivity apps have the same 5 features. 3 outliers -Forest, Todoist, and RescueTime- saw 10x growth by doing things differently.
Todoist's 'Someday' feature helps users cut 27% of unnecessary tasks from their lists.
Forest's gamified productivity system increases focused worktime by 25%, with 40% of users reporting improved work quality.
Don't over-rely on reminders: calendar blocking with Google Calendar can reduce meeting time by 21%.
Implementing a '2-minute rule' for emails reduces response time by 32%, as seen in a study of 1,000 users.
Batching similar tasks reduces context switching by 30%, as used by 75% of developers at Microsoft.
What's the most effective productivity hack you've discovered in an app, and how has it changed your workflow? #productivityhacks #appdevelopment
